_doc: Utility-flywheel cycle queue. status: building | candidate | done. ratified is flipped by a HUMAN only (anti-runaway anchor, spec-U1-wiring-flywheel.md); an unratified candidate is a proposal, never a work order. Every entry must carry evidence (artifact paths) — evidence-free entries are invalid.

cycles.title: Network-wiring truth: connectivity catalog -> review sweep -> wire_by_label + validator pin
Parameter-name truth: gate emitted parm()/setParm literals against the nodetype catalog's live parm fingerprints
cycles.note: The nodetype catalog already carries ordered [(parm, type, default)] per resolved type — the same sweep pattern (createNode var map -> parm('x') literals) closes the loop nobody gates today.

cycles.title: Source-output-index truth: validate setInput's third arg against catalog output_count/output_labels
cycles.note: v2 catalog now carries output_count + ordered output_labels (e.g. vellumconstraints out 1 = Constraint Geometry, relied on by solver.setInput(1, cloth, 1)); the U.1 sweep only proves the TARGET side.

cycles.title: Wire-time arity guard at the dynamic-index API boundary (handlers_node/api_adapter setInput passthroughs)
cycles.note: The sweep's dynamic-index INFO sites are runtime passthroughs with no catalog check; wiring.wire_by_label/catalog lookup can gate them at call time.

cycles.title: LOP/Solaris knowledge (CONTEXT truth): corpus-authored catalog -> consistency gate -> loader + additive validator advisory phase
cycles.note: RATIFIED 2026-07-03 (human sanction) — U.5 accepted as a context-truth cycle class. NEW cycle CLASS — CONTEXT truth (per-LOP role/usd_type/parms, ordering, known-absent), a different axis from U.1-U.4 WIRING truth. Shipped to feat/h22-knowledge-flywheel; the anti-runaway anchor's human sign-off is now granted. Substantive design call: assignmaterial->material-source ordering is an ADVISORY, not a hard error (reference/sublayer composition arcs author materials too); grid/plane stay hard errors. Ledger deposit via scripts/flywheel_review_lop.py --deposit (run under hython post-merge, like U.1).

cycles.title: Context-capability truth: per-Houdini-context (SOP/LOP/COP/TOP/DOP/MAT) create-capability probe via the live handler surface -> catalog -> review sweep -> golden+ratchet improvement sprints
cycles.note: NEW cycle CLASS — CAPABILITY truth (what SYNAPSE can actually CREATE per context, measured by driving SynapseHandler.handle() under hython — the same surface the live WS path calls), a different axis from WIRING truth (U.1-U.4) and CONTEXT truth (U.5). Human-requested 2026-07-06 (per-context review + improvement directive); queued per the anti-runaway anchor for the same sign-off U.5 got. The catalog file (harness/notes/context_capability_21.json) is also the C.1-C.6 arming trigger, peer of drop.json/BP00_manifest.md.

cycles.title: Studio-readiness truth: the 24-finding deployment review wrapped into durable finding-fingerprint regression gates (posture trigger -> S.1-S.R hardening + capstone review)
cycles.note: NEW cycle CLASS — READINESS truth (does the code still carry each verified deployment finding), a different axis from WIRING/CONTEXT/CAPABILITY truth. Each S-check fingerprints a live finding: RED now (finding present), GREEN when fixed, and never silently regresses. Human-requested 2026-07-06 ('wrap the observations into a harness ... with review at the end'). Trigger = harness/state/posture.json (deploy-mode declaration), peer of drop.json. S.1-S.3 are human_gate: the harness gates + reviews auth/consent fixes, it never autonomously rewrites security code and never merges. Queued per the anti-runaway anchor for the same sign-off U.5 got.

cycles.title: Release-readiness truth (H22 RC): the 2026-07-10 external readiness review wrapped into 12 durable regression gates + a receipts-backed release-label capstone (ratify -> R.1-R.10 remediation + R.R verdict)
cycles.note: NEW cycle CLASS — RELEASE truth (does the shipping product still carry each verified release-blocking defect, and is every release-label claim receipt-backed), a different axis from WIRING/CONTEXT/CAPABILITY/READINESS/DIAGNOSTIC truth. Every review claim adversarially verified 2026-07-10 (11-agent sweep, all CONFIRMED; refinements: THREE fail-open mutation sites not two; panel close FALSE-POSITIVES a freeze escalation; a second consent disarm in shared/bridge.py that S.2 cannot see; gate-0.1 already DECIDED sidecar). Human-requested 2026-07-10 ('create a harness to address these changes'); queued per the anti-runaway anchor for the same sign-off U.5/D.0 received. Trigger = this ratified flip (second JSON-predicate trigger, D.0 pattern); R.9 stays human_gate (security authoring). The R.R verdict is computable UNRATIFIED via checks.py --task R.R; ratification only lets the loop DRIVE the fixes.

cycles.title: Diagnostic truth (COOK/RUNTIME): cook-API confirmation probe -> perturbation catalog -> review sweep -> recook-explainer + callback-diagnosis handlers gated by per-context goldens
cycles.note: NEW cycle CLASS — DIAGNOSTIC truth (what the scene observably DOES when poked: dirty-propagation, recook triggers, time-dependence, callback runtime errors), a different axis from WIRING (U.1-U.4), CONTEXT (U.5), CAPABILITY (C.0), READINESS (S.0). Sourced from the ODFORCE scour's two CROWN findings (cook-graph explainer, callback debugger) — the only scour candidates whose moat is impossible without in-process truth. Phantom-first: every candidate hou.* symbol is UNVERIFIED until the §1 probe confirms it; absences auto-quarantine. TOPs dirty/cook surface is shipped and untouched (tops_path_untouched guard). Scope-safe under the declared allowlist AND under a future procedural-only narrowing — the track only reads and reverts. Queued per the anti-runaway anchor for the same human sign-off U.5 received.

cycles.title: Port-wave crucible BW-1 (scene-1, sev-3, MUST-FIX-BEFORE render/tops): ws_passthrough outer timeout under-budgets send_command 2-attempt retry above ~cmd_timeout 72s. Breaches at render (120s), tops_batch_cook (300s), render_sequence (600s) — cancels a legacy transparent-retry-success mid-flight, misreports as generic timeout, leaks _pending[command_id] (CancelledError bypasses cleanup). cycles.title: W.5 crucible follow-ups (sev-3 + sev-2): (BW-1, the important one) the write routing predicate is value-shape-only — a custom string[] attribute name that is neither a valid attribute nor an existing relationship, holding /-rooted path strings, gets SILENTLY authored as a relationship; converts a prior no-op into a possibly-wrong author, and the write envelope carries no property_kind (asymmetric with the read path) so the caller cannot tell which was authored. Fix: add property_kind to the WRITE envelope + advisory when CreateRelationship fires on a name not already a known relationship. (BW-2) the miss-both error text changed attribute->property + appended a relationships clause (safe: zero consumer pins, ValueError shape unchanged) — document as intentional. SHOULD land before usd-1 golden-pins the write path.
cycles.note: Deposited from the W.5-H22-karmarels crucible (MERGE_READY, 0 showstoppers). BW-1 is a NEW silent-wrongness edge in W.5's own added code (not a regression — prior was no-op), same repair-to-approved-work class as W.1b. Human flip; recommend ratifying before the usd-1 wave.

cycles.title: W.7 crucible follow-up (BW-1, sev-2 forward-risk): _RECONNECT_BUDGET=75.0 is a flat hand-picked constant, not derived from _get_connection worst case. Comfortable under the documented single-user-localhost/auth-DISABLED posture (~24s reconnect worst, +51s margin at render_sequence). BUT if auth is ever enabled, or MAX_RETRIES/candidate-URL-count/handshake timeouts grow, the 2-attempt reconnect worst approaches ~70s and collapses the margin, re-introducing the exact watchdog-preempts-retry failure W.7 fixed. Fix: derive the reconnect term from the connection constants, OR add a test that fails if _RECONNECT_BUDGET < computed reconnect worst case. Also (BW-2, cosmetic): the "~72s" threshold narrative is imprecise — real crossover is per>60s; the >72 test slice is conservative-correct, just the figure is slightly misleading.
cycles.note: Deposited from the W.7+W.8 crucible (MERGE_READY, 0 showstoppers). Not a current-posture blocker (auth is disabled by default); becomes load-bearing only if multi-user/auth is enabled. Human flip.

cycles.title: U.1-H22 fold crucible forward-notes (sev-2 pair): (1) _running_houdini_major() collapses "hou importable but version unreadable" to major=None -> silently serves H21 in a real H22 host; reserve the H21 default for ImportError ONLY, any other exception with hou resident should fail loud. (2) major-granularity: applicationVersion()[0] cannot distinguish .5/minor builds — add an optional load-time stamp-vs-live warn (the HYTHON-gated freshness check catches it but not the runtime resolver). (3) conftest fake-hou hardcodes applicationVersion=(21,0,671) — pin this coupling intentionally so a future version-follower wave flipping it to 22 does not silently flip the whole standalone suite's default catalog.

cycles.title: RETINA.M1 crucible follow-up (sev-2, one line): T0 sibling honesty gap in retina/t0.py — when ALL declared products are missing (existing==[]), the resolution (~L239-249) and fingerprint_receipt (~L274-283) per-checks report pass=True (detail string is honest "no readable product to check..." but the BOOLEAN is wrong) while aovs correctly returns None. Root cause: the "if not res_results and unreadable" guard cannot fire when unreadable is also empty; aovs has the correct "if not existing" guard, resolution/fingerprint do not. The exact RETINA thesis violation ("a check must not claim what it couldnt verify") the M1 repair targeted, relocated to the all-missing edge. BOUNDED: event-level verdict is still "fail" (products_exist=False dominates) so no false event GREEN ships — but the dishonest per-check boolean persists in the receipt JSONL, and the receipt IS the product. Fix: add "if not existing: res_pass = None" (+ fp equivalent), mirroring the aovs guard.
cycles.note: Deposited from the RETINA.M1 Pass-2 crucible (MERGE_READY, 0 showstoppers — the independent reviewer ruled it bounded because no false event-level verdict ships). Human flip; one-line fix worth landing before M2 builds on T0. | RATIFIED: human (Joe) — 2026-07-17 "everything is pre-ratified" (Claude as instrument). BUILT + regression-tested + merged this session (Opus): retina/t0.py all-missing guard now mirrors the aovs `not existing` guard (resolution + fingerprint_receipt return None, not a vacuous True, when every product is missing); tests/test_retina_t0.py::test_all_products_missing_header_checks_inconclusive_not_pass pins it. T0 receipt honesty closed — M2 may build on it.

cycles.title: RETINA M2 crucible bounded findings — rides M3's disk-outbox worker build. (1) JSONL verdict atomicity: emit_verdict claims line-atomic but a large line (84KB observed) exceeds PIPE_BUF; add fsync/tmp+replace + a malformed-trailing-line-tolerant resume reader (mirror ss16 RecommendationHistory.from_jsonl). (2) Path-containment guard: T0 can stat/read arbitrary files a manifest points at — add a within-manifest-dir guard before any less-trusted manifest source. (4) OIIO ingest leg unverified on the dev interp (OIIO absent) — live-verify in the worker/hython-seeded venv.
